scripts.architecture:guard: npm run lint:architecture && npm run typecheck:architecture
scripts.mode:human: node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('.husky/.bypass', '1')" && echo "Human mode active - Git hooks will be bypassed."
scripts.mode:bot: node -e "var fs=require('fs'); if(fs.existsSync('.husky/.bypass')) fs.unlinkSync('.husky/.bypass')" && echo "Bot mode active - Git hooks are enforced."
scripts.training:e2e: node scripts/training-e2e.mjs --bridge-mode bridge --resume-checkpoint latest --resume-strict false --with-trainer-server true
scripts.test:v28:regression: node scripts/verify-lock.mjs --playwright -- npx playwright test tests/v28-regression.spec.js
scripts.test:fast: node scripts/verify-lock.mjs --playwright -- npx playwright test tests/core.spec.js tests/physics-core.spec.js
scripts.test:core: node scripts/verify-lock.mjs --playwright -- npx playwright test tests/core.spec.js
scripts.test:gpu: node scripts/verify-lock.mjs --playwright -- npx playwright test tests/gpu.spec.js
scripts.test:physics: node scripts/verify-lock.mjs --playwright -- npx playwright test tests/physics-core.spec.js tests/physics-hunt.spec.js tests/physics-policy.spec.js
scripts.test:physics:core: node scripts/verify-lock.mjs --playwright -- npx playwright test tests/physics-core.spec.js
scripts.test:physics:hunt: node scripts/verify-lock.mjs --playwright -- npx playwright test tests/physics-hunt.spec.js
scripts.test:physics:policy: node scripts/verify-lock.mjs --playwright -- npx playwright test tests/physics-policy.spec.js
scripts.test:stress: node scripts/verify-lock.mjs --playwright -- npx playwright test tests/stress.spec.js
